posts.author: pllgevdk (Lennard Larsen)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be very useful if all our employees could have a “Personal” workspace (sitting just above “My Work”).
At the moment we need to make a Personal workspace, and then have every employee create a private board in this workspace. Which is not very smart.
This new Personal workspace could also be the entry point for the Free plan.
